sections.title: Matched acquisition context
sections.text:
Since this Arcane only triggers when shields are damaged, it has no benefit on Inaros, Kullervo, and Nidus, as they have no shields to begin with, or during a Nightmare Mode mission with the No Shields modifier.

Activating Arcane Aegis once will break the 80% Shield Recharge cap for the rest of the mission or until death.

excerpt:
Since this Arcane only triggers when shields are damaged, it has no benefit on Inaros, Kullervo, and Nidus, as they have no shields to begin with, or during a Nightmare Mode mission with the No Shields modifier.

Activating Arcane Aegis once will break the 80% Shield Recharge cap for the rest of the mission or until death.

sections.title: Matched acquisition context
sections.text: Conjunction Arcanes are Secondary Arcanes introduced in Update 32.2 (2022-11-30), obtainable from Conjunction Survival.

excerpt: Conjunction Arcanes are Secondary Arcanes introduced in Update 32.2 (2022-11-30), obtainable from Conjunction Survival.

Akimbo Slip Shot TradeableMax Rank DescriptionWhile sliding or aim gliding: Gain 65% ammo efficiency with Dual Pistols.General InformationTypeSecondaryRarityRare Refreshable❌Max Rank5Arcanes Required to Max21Dissolution 24Trading Tax 8,000IntroducedUpdate 33.5 (2023-06-21)Vendor SourcesAcrithis  10 for x1Official Drop Tableshttps://www.warframe.com/droptablesMaintenance📝 Update Infobox Data
Akimbo Slip Shot is a Secondary Arcane that increases Ammo Efficiency while sliding or aim gliding with Dual Pistols.

Contents

1 Effect
2 Acquisition
3 Notes
4 Patch History

Effect

Rank

Ammo Efficiency

0
+15%

1
+25%

2
+35%

3
+45%

4
+55%

5
+65%

Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 3, 4, 6, or 7 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10  Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the Arcanes to appear in her shop.
May drop from side Undercroft portals in The Duviri Experience while on The Steel Path.
Notes
Cannot be equipped on Exalted Weapons like  Dex Pixia.
Can be equipped on the ( Prisma)  Dual Decurion.
Additive with  Zazvat-Kar for maximum Ammo Efficiency on the  Akstiletto Prime.
Patch History

Hotfix 40.0.3 (2025-10-21)

Akbimo Slipshot[sic] Arcane can now be equipped on the (Prisma) Dual Decurions Archguns.
Update 33.5 (2023-06-21)

Introduced.

 Arcanes Edit

sections.title: Matched acquisition context
sections.text:
Arcane Acceleration was first introduced in the Trial mission The Law of Retribution, which was retired in Update 22.14 (2018-03-01).

The Operation: Belly of the Beast event sold Arcane Acceleration from Ordis for 3 Volatile Motes in the first run of the event, and 4 Motes in the second, with a purchase limit of 42.

The Operation: Eight Claw event sold Arcane Acceleration from Dominus Thrax in bundles of 7, costing 2 Dominus Aureus, with a purchase limit of 3 (21 Arcanes in total).

Arcane Aegis was first introduced in the Trial mission The Jordas Verdict, which was retired in Update 22.14 (2018-03-01).

The Operation: Belly of the Beast event sold Arcane Aegis from Ordis for 5 Volatile Motes in the first run of the event, and 6 Motes in the second, with a purchase limit of 42.

The Operation: Eight Claw event sold Arcane Aegis from Dominus Thrax in bundles of 7, costing 4 Dominus Aureus, with a purchase limit of 3 (21 Arcanes total).

The Operation: Blood of Perita event sold Arcane Aegis from Roathe for 4 Marks of Valiance with a purchase limit of 21 per week.

Activating Arcane Aegis once will break the 80% Shield Recharge cap for the rest of the mission or until death.

sections.title: Matched acquisition context
sections.text:
Compared to Molt Augmented, this Arcane's Ability Strength bonus is constantly active even if the player uses a Revive, but is highly dependent on the given Warframe's maximum health. Assuming both Arcanes are at max rank, Arcane Bellicose will require 2,480 maximum health to match Molt Augmented's Ability Strength bonus at 250 kills.

The following Arcane Collections are now available for Vosfor in Loid’s Arcane Dissolution: Hӧllvania Arcane Collection (includes the Hex and Temporal Archimedea Arcanes) Arcane Bellicose

sections.title: Matched acquisition context
sections.text:
Once a player loses all their Health, they do not enter the Bleedout phase; they die instantly. Furthermore, they are not allowed to revive themselves. Sacrifice, Inaros' Undying Passive, Sevagoth's Tombstone Passive, Nokko's Vital Decay Passive, and Unairu's Last Gasp do not function in Arbitrations. However Nidus' Adaptive Mutation Passive, Wukong's Five Levels of Immortality Passive, Inaros' Negation Armor, Loki's Savior Decoy, Oberon's Phoenix Renewal, Khora's Venari Bodyguard, Protea's Temporal Anchor, Dagath's Grave Spirit, Trinity's Well of Life, Arcane Escapist, and Emergence Savior still function normally. In general, only effects that do not enter the bleedout phase at all will work. Companion's incapacitation and self-revive will function normally in Arbitrations. When a player dies, a Revive Tower will appear at their place of death with a waypoint, and Arbitration Shield Drones (see below) will begin to drop Resurgence Tokens on death. Resurgence Tokens function identically to Index Points: Picking them up will give the stacking Resurgence Burden debuff, which lowers Warframe maximum health and shields and constantly drains energy. 5 Resurgence Tokens are needed to revive a dead player, but they do not need to be carried by the same Warframe. Warframes carrying a cumulative total of 5 points must bring them to the Revive Tower at the same time. If a Warframe carrying Resurgence Tokens dies, all the tokens they are carrying will be lost. Resurgence Tokens are unaffected by Vacuum and Fetch. Once all players are revived or the dead players leave the mission, excess Resurgence Tokens will disappear, removing the debuff.

Arbitration rotation rewards (excluding Omni Forma) have been added to the Arbitration store (Arbiters of Hexis in the Relay) to provide players an easier path to these items via Vitus Essence: Arcanes Arcane Pistoleer Arcane Tanker Arcane Bodyguard Arcane Blade Charger Arcane Primary Charger Mods Combat Discipline Adaptation Aerodynamic Shepherd Melee Guidance Swift Momentum Seeding Step Ephemera Blueprint

excerpt:
Once a player loses all their Health, they do not enter the Bleedout phase; they die instantly. Furthermore, they are not allowed to revive themselves. Sacrifice, Inaros' Undying Passive, Sevagoth's Tombstone Passive, Nokko's Vital Decay Passive, and Unairu's Last Gasp do not function in Arbitrations. However Nidus' Adaptive Mutation Passive, Wukong's Five Levels of Immortality Passive, Inaros' Negation Armor, Loki's Savior Decoy, Oberon's Phoenix Renewal, Khora's Venari Bodyguard, Protea's Temporal Anchor, Dagath's Grave Spirit, Trinity's Well of Life, Arcane Escapist, and Emergence Savior still function normally. In general, only effects that do not enter the bleedout phase at all will work. Companion's incapacitation and self-revive will function normally in Arbitrations. When a player dies, a Revive Tower will appear at their place of death with a waypoint, and Arbitration Shield Drones (see below) will begin to drop Resurgence Tokens on death. Resurgence Tokens function identically to Index Points: Picking them up will give the stacking Resurgence Burden debuff, which lowers Warframe maximum health and shields and constantly drains energy. 5 Resurgence Tokens are needed to revive a dead player, but they do not need to be carried by the same Warframe. Warframes carrying a cumulative total of 5 points must bring them to the Revive Tower at the same time. If a Warframe carrying Resurgence Tokens dies, all the tokens they are carrying will be lost. Resurgence Tokens are unaffected by Vacuum and Fetch. Once all players are revived or the dead players leave the mission, excess Resurgence Tokens will disappear, removing the debuff.

Arbitration rotation rewards (excluding Omni Forma) have been added to the Arbitration store (Arbiters of Hexis in the Relay) to provide players an easier path to these items via Vitus Essence: Arcanes Arcane Pistoleer Arcane Tanker Arcane Bodyguard Arcane Blade Charger Arcane Primary Charger Mods Combat Discipline Adaptation Aerodynamic Shepherd Melee Guidance Swift Momentum Seeding Step Ephemera Blueprint

Nightwave's Series 2: The Emissary & Intermission III awarded one Arcane Grace at Rank 27.

The Operation: Belly of the Beast event sold Arcane Grace from Ordis for 46 Volatile Motes in the first run of the event, and 30 Motes in the second, with a purchase limit of 42.

The Operation: Eight Claw event sold Arcane Grace from Dominus Thrax in bundles of 3, costing 22 Dominus Aureus, with a purchase limit of 7 (21 Arcanes in total).

Arcane Ice Storm can be obtained from Ascension's optional Sister of Parvos, summoned by acquiring 3 Sister Beacons during the elevator ride. Alternatively it can be purchased from Ordis in the Drifter's Camp for 10 Vestigial Motes, for a total of 210 for max rank.

The following Arcane Collections are now available for Vosfor in Loid’s Arcane Dissolution: Cavia Arcane Collection (includes the Cavia and Ascension Arcanes) Arcane Ice Storm

Arcane Intention TradeableMax Rank DescriptionGain +250 Max Health per active channeled ability.General InformationTypeWarframeRarityUncommon Refreshable✔️Incompatibility TagsOPERATOR_SUITMax Rank5Arcanes Required to Max21Dissolution 18Trading Tax 4,000IntroducedUpdate 33.0 (2023-04-26)Vendor SourcesAcrithis  10 for x1Official Drop Tableshttps://www.warframe.com/droptablesMaintenance📝 Update Infobox Data
Arcane Intention is an Arcane Enhancement that increases maximum health for every active channeled ability.

Contents

1 Effect
2 Acquisition
3 Notes
4 Eligible Abilities
5 Tips
6 Patch History

Effect

Rank

Max Health Bonus

0
+40

1
+80

2
+120

3
+160

4
+200

5
+250

Acquisition
May appear as a Steel Path Circuit Tier 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, or +11 reward on a weekly rotational basis.
May be sold by Acrithis for 10  Pathos Clamp on a daily rotational basis, requiring Drifter Intrinsics Opportunity Rank 9 for the arcanes to appear in her shop.
One of possible rewards from completing the optional Undercroft Portals in Duviri while on the Steel Path.
Notes
The bonus stacks for every channeled ability simultaneously active, up to a maximum of 4 stacks (+1000 Health at max rank).
Besides increasing maximum health, activating this Arcane also heals the Warframe by the same amount of hitpoints.
After the ability that sustained this Arcane's effect ends, there is a 1 second delay during which said ability cannot be reactivated.
Eligible Abilities
Only the following abilities can trigger this effect:

Does not qualify if  Tectonic Fracture is used.

Helminth

 Parasitic Armor

Tips
Many Warframes lack channeled abilities altogether, making it impossible to use this Arcane with them. Certain abilities can be transferred via Helminth to circumvent this:
 Gloom can be infused onto any Warframe in order to give them a channeled ability and enable the use of this Arcane.
 Mind Control and  Parasitic Armor are abilities with high base duration that can maintain this Arcane's effect without constant energy drain.
 Pillage,  Coil Horizon and  Quiver are also Helminth-compatible and can make use of this Arcane's secondary effect of instant healing upon ability activation.

Patch History

Hotfix 33.0.11 (2023-05-24)

Fixed rare crash that would occur when viewing Arcane Intention while in the Arsenal.
Update 33.0 (2023-04-26)

Introduced.
